title: Decouple and retire external Cabinet app runtime
goal: Remove the external Cabinet AI Workspace as a repository foundation and retire its local runtime only after catalog independence, private-data export and consumer evidence are complete.

acceptance.assertion: Catalog validation, rendering and agent orientation pass while cabinet.service is stopped.
A reviewed private backup/export receipt exists before runtime removal.
The service, wrappers, pinned external app and app-specific patches are disabled or removed with a rollback record.
No versioned or classified-for-preservation content is lost.

metadata.source_decision: Cabinet is to become an app-independent Heimgewebe system catalog.
